'''wapatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:saala|saala]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saala|saala]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wapatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæpæthæth|wæpæthæth]] || [[word:wæpæthæj|wæpæthæj]] || [[word:wæpæthæsh|wæpæthæsh]] || [[word:wæpæthæ|wæpæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapapathath|wapapathath]] || [[word:wapapathaj|wapapathaj]] || [[word:wapapathash|wapapathash]] || [[word:wapapatha|wapapatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapathath|wapathath]] || [[word:wapathaj|wapathaj]] || [[word:wapathash|wapathash]] || [[word:wapatha|wapatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapafthath|wapafthath]] || [[word:wapafthaj|wapafthaj]] || [[word:wapafthash|wapafthash]] || [[word:wapafthaf|wapafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wapathatha|wapathatha]] || [[word:wapathaja|wapathaja]] || [[word:wapathasha|wapathasha]] || [[word:wapathaka|wapathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wapathath|wapathath]] || [[word:wapathaj|wapathaj]] || [[word:wapathash|wapathash]] || [[word:wapatha|wapatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wapathathal|wapathathal]] || [[word:wapathajal|wapathajal]] || [[word:wapathashal|wapathashal]] || [[word:wapathakal|wapathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wapathathatha|wapathathatha]] || [[word:wapathajaja|wapathajaja]] || [[word:wapathashasha|wapathashasha]] || [[word:wapathaka|wapathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wapathathan|wapathathan]] || [[word:wapathajan|wapathajan]] || [[word:wapathashan|wapathashan]] || [[word:wapathakan|wapathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wapathathaoro|wapathathaoro]] || [[word:wapathajaoro|wapathajaoro]] || [[word:wapathashaoro|wapathashaoro]] || [[word:wapathakaoro|wapathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
